prompt_text:
### Demographics: 36-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 100.1 kg; Height 182.1 cm; BMI 30.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 98.7kg; 9 months ago 98.7kg; 6 months ago 102.9kg; 3 months ago 99.3kg; current 100.1kg), Height (12 months ago 182.1cm; 9 months ago 182.1cm; 6 months ago 182.1cm; 3 months ago 182.1cm; current 182.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 106U/L; 6 months ago 107U/L; 3 months ago 99U/L; current 106U/L), AST (12 months ago 97U/L; 9 months ago 104U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 108U/L; current 106U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 705mg/g; 9 months ago 790mg/g; 6 months ago 1021mg/g; 3 months ago 1009mg/g; current 904mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 102mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 153mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 148mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.6g/dL; 9 months ago 11.6g/dL; 6 months ago 11.7g/dL; 3 months ago 11.7g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
